description_long: This factory building is a large, rectangular structure with a flat roof and multiple stories, featuring a grid of expansive industrial windows along its facade. The exterior is primarily composed of brick and concrete, with blue-tinted window panels that suggest a modernized industrial design. The building includes a prominent main section and an attached secondary wing, both exhibiting utilitarian architectural elements. The rooftop is equipped with visible mechanical installations, such as vents and HVAC units, indicating its industrial function. The ground level appears to have several large entryways suitable for freight or vehicle access, typical of factory buildings. The overall appearance is robust and functional, with minimal decorative detailing and a focus on practicality.
description: A multi-story, brick and concrete factory building with large blue industrial windows, flat roof, and visible rooftop machinery. The structure is robust and utilitarian, designed for industrial use.
description_view_0: The main facade and side of the factory building are visible, showing rows of large blue windows and the attached secondary wing.
description_view_1: The building is viewed head-on from the front, highlighting the main entrance and the symmetrical arrangement of industrial windows.
description_view_2: The opposite side and rear of the building are visible, with the secondary wing and more industrial windows in view.
description_view_3: A direct rear view of the building, showing the back facade and rooftop machinery.
